name: improver_accepts_good_change
description: Train F1 improves and holdout stays above the floor: tests the change in memory first, records the attempt as accepted, and saves the prompt.
user_message: Run evals and improve the classifier. Run at most one iteration.

failures.title: Lowe's: 20% Off Select Gift Cards
failures.human_reasoning: Discounted gift cards require spending; never a moneymaker.
failures.content_snippet: Save 20% on select gift cards at Lowe's this week...

tool_responses.get_classifier_prompt: You classify Doctor of Credit blog posts into one of five labels... (original prompt)

propose_prompt_improvement.new_prompt:
You classify Doctor of Credit blog posts into one of five labels... (original prompt)
Discounted gift cards are never MONEYMAKERS: a discount requires spending.
propose_prompt_improvement.what_changed: Added an explicit rule that discounted gift cards are not moneymakers.
propose_prompt_improvement.why: The classifier labels gift-card discounts as MONEYMAKER because the % savings looks like profit.

tool_responses.set_classifier_prompt: Prompt updated in memory. Run eval to test it, then call save_classifier_prompt to persist.
